raw_consumer_statement:
I purchased car tabs and registration for my car from XXXX XXXXXXXX. When I reached out to the XXXX XXXX XXXX, they refused to help me because I no longer owned the car. I had purchased a new car and I was told when I received the registration and tabs, to return them for a refund. 

I filed a dispute with Citi Bank. Sent the documentation requested and I heard nothing from Citi Bank. Months later I contacted Citi Bank and I was told they never received the requested information. I informed them I could see the documentation I submitted and it was suggested I resubmit the documentation. To date, I have heard nothing from Citi Bank.
